title: trifolium involucratum var. arizonicum
intro: Trifolium involucratum var. arizonicum, also known as Arizona cluster clover, is a type of legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Arizona cluster clover include its ability to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential interactions.
